hooks.command: diff -q "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/skills/sahaj-presentation/scripts/requirements.txt" "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}/requirements.txt" >/dev/null 2>&1 || (cd "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}" && python3 -m venv .venv && .venv/bin/pip install -r "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/skills/sahaj-presentation/scripts/requirements.txt" && cp "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/skills/sahaj-presentation/scripts/requirements.txt" .) || true
